strengths: Extensive backend and distributed-systems experience with event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media)
Strong hands-on technical leadership and mentorship demonstrated through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions
Proven ability to scale systems and teams, including CI/CD, TDD, and performance optimization (e.g., re:cinq, Optilyz)
concerns: Limited direct experience with agentic AI systems in production environments or fintech infrastructure
No clear evidence of leadership in scaling engineering organizations beyond 10 people or developing technical leadership layers
Lack of demonstrated experience with regulated high-stakes environments or fintech-specific domains like credit risk or payment flows
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical depth in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and engineering leadership through diverse roles and open-source contributions. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of agentic AI system design in production, fintech infrastructure experience, or leadership in high-stakes regulated environments, which are critical for the CTO role. His adaptability and technical craftsmanship are notable but may not fully align with the specialized requirements of the position.
